title: (Bullish Signal) GSHD, Aroon Indicator entered an Uptrend on Oct 28, 2020.
author: tickeron_community
selftext:
Over the last three days, Tickeron A.I.dvisor has detected that GSHD's AroonUp green line (see chart) is above 70, while the AroonDown red line is below 30. When the green line goes above 70 while the red line stays below 30, this is an indicator that the stock could be poised for a strong Uptrend. For traders, this could mean going long the stock or exploring call options in the next month. Tickeron A.I.dvisor backtested this indicator and found 175 similar cases, 151 of which were successful. Based on this data, the odds of success are 86%. Current price $106.25 is above $102.21 the highest support line found by Tickeron A.I. Throughout the month of 09/28/20 - 10/28/20, the price experienced a +28% Uptrend. During the week of 10/21/20 - 10/28/20, the stock enjoyed a +2% Uptrend growth.

https://preview.redd.it/jmgo54aw92w51.png?width=1529&format=png&auto=webp&s=3ce847f3d8cc382d68ce908acc88b10a4ef4eae2

**Bullish Trend Analysis**

The Moving Average Convergence Divergence (MACD) for GSHD just turned positive on October 05, 2020. Looking at past instances where GSHD's MACD turned positive, the stock continued to rise, Tickeron A.I. shows that in 23 of 26 cases over the following month. The odds of a continued upward trend are 88%.

GSHD moved above its 50-day Moving Average on October 12, 2020 date and that indicates a change from a downward trend to an upward trend.

The 10-day Moving Average for GSHD crossed bullishly above the 50-day moving average on October 16, 2020. This indicates that the trend has shifted higher and could be considered a buy signal. Tickeron A.I. detected that in 7 of 8 past instances when the 10-day crossed above the 50-day, the stock continued to move higher over the following month. The odds of a continued upward trend are 88%.

Following a +2.55% 3-day Advance, the price is estimated to grow further. Considering data from situations where GSHD advanced for three days, in 145 of 160 cases, the price rose further within the following month. The odds of a continued upward trend are 90%.

The Aroon Indicator entered an Uptrend today. Tickeron A.I. detected that in 151 of 175 cases where GSHD Aroon's Indicator entered an Uptrend, the price rose further within the following month. The odds of a continued Uptrend are 86%.
